title: SF Public Works General Excavation Permit

indexed_extract.summary: General Excavation permits require application, drawings, utility authorization, administrative and inspection fees, possible street space/no-parking fees, insurance, business registration, and a $25,000 street excavation bond.
key_points: Permit fee generally combines administrative + inspection fees + supplemental fees.
Street Space and no-parking sign fees may also apply.
A $25,000 bond is required and should be modeled as a permit-path requirement rather than a fee line item.

notes: Important SF right-of-way permit logic source.
